item.title: How to Create a Simple Object Detection System with Python and ImageAI
item.description: As you have seen, ImageAI library enables us to build an object detection system without having to deal with the complexity behind object detection model like ResNet or YOLO for custom objects.

item.title: Classifying objects from 3D CAD files - OpenCV Forum
item.description: Industrial inspection talks about “Machine Vision”. OpenCV industrial inspection.

item.title: You Can’t Scale AI With Real Data Alone: A Practical Guide to Synthetic Data Generation | HackerNoon
item.description: Synthetic data is transforming AI by solving privacy, bias, and scalability challenges. Learn methods, use cases, and key risks for Synthetic data generation for defects.

item.title: Intro to Autoencoders | TensorFlow Core
item.description: This tutorial introduces autoencoders with three examples: the basics, image denoising, and anomaly detection. Autoencoder anomaly detection code implementation.

item.title: An Overview of Log-Based Anomaly Detection Techniques
item.description: An Overview of Log-Based Anomaly Detection Techniques

item.title: Deploy Custom Object Detection using Flask & Python, Step by Step | Towards Data Science
item.description: Implementation details for YOLO for custom objects.

item.title: Generating/Expanding your datasets with synthetic data
item.description: Generating/Expanding your datasets with synthetic data, providing implementation details for Synthetic data generation for defects.
